name: claude-manager-monorepo
description: Repo-root for ESLint config and dev tooling. Each sub-package (gateway/, spawner/, manager/, manager/web/) has its own deps.

scripts.lint: eslint manager/cli.ts manager/daemon.ts manager/orchestrator-mcp.ts manager/tui.tsx manager/shared/ spawner/worker.ts spawner/jsonl-parser.ts gateway/server.ts gateway/verify.ts manager/web/src/
